task_completion.description: Set page margins to 2.00 inches for the top and 1.00 inch for the left, right, and bottom.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Page Style' dialog box showing the Top margin set to 2.00" and Left, Right, and Bottom margins set to 1.00", or verify the ruler dimensions visually.

task_completion.description: Insert the company logo into the document header.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an image (the Apex Innovations logo) placed inside the top header area of the LibreOffice Writer document.

task_completion.description: Add center-aligned grey text to the footer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Apex Innovations | 123 Tech Blvd, Silicon Valley, CA' in the footer area. Verify that it is center-aligned and colored grey.

task_completion.description: Create a custom paragraph style named 'Apex Title' with specific font settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Paragraph Style' dialog or the Styles sidebar showing a style named 'Apex Title'. The font settings (visible in the dialog or toolbar) must show Liberation Sans or Arial, size 18pt, Bold, and Dark Blue color.

task_completion.description: Create a custom paragraph style named 'Apex Body' with specific font settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Paragraph Style' dialog or the Styles sidebar showing a style named 'Apex Body'. The font settings must show Liberation Serif or Times New Roman, size 11pt, and Black color.

task_completion.description: Save the document as a LibreOffice Writer Template (.ott) in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Save As' dialog showing the file name 'apex_letterhead.ott' with the 'ODF Text Document Template (.ott)' format selected in the /home/ga/Documents directory, or the main LibreOffice window title bar displaying 'apex_letterhead.ott'.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Writer GUI to create the template.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LibreOffice Writer application interface being actively used (menus, dialogs, toolbars), rather than terminal commands or python scripts generating the file.

integrity.description: The agent inserted the actual image file rather than typing placeholder text.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for an actual image file being selected from the file picker or visible in the document, not just a text box saying 'logo'.

integrity.description: The agent created actual paragraph styles rather than just applying direct formatting to text.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with the 'Styles' sidebar (F11) or 'New Style from Selection' dialogs, rather than just using the main toolbar to change font properties of standard text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output path: /home/ga/Documents/apex_letterhead.ott. Margins: Top 2.0 inches, Left/Right/Bottom 1.0 inches. Footer text: 'Apex Innovations | 123 Tech Blvd, Silicon Valley, CA'. Custom Style 1: 'Apex Title', Font: Liberation Sans or Arial, Size: 18pt, Weight: Bold, Color: Dark Blue (#00008B). Custom Style 2: 'Apex Body', Font: Liberation Serif or Times New Roman, Size: 11pt, Color: Black (#000000).
